column4: How is the questionnaire completed?     Comment le questionnaire est-il rempli?
column5: 1. In the past month, have you had difficulty swallowing or have you choked?
column6: 2. In the past month, has saliva dribbled out of your mouth?
column7: 3. In the past month, has food ever become stuck in your throath?
column8: 4. In the past month, did you ever have the feeling during a meal that you were full very quickly?
column9: 5. Constipation is a blockage of the bowel, a condition in which someone has a bowel movement twice a week or less.  In the past month, have you had problems with constipation?
column10: 6. In the past month, did you have to strain hard to pass stools?
column11: 7. In the past month, have you had involuntary loss of stools?
column12: Questions 8 to 13 deal with problems with passing urine. If you use a catheter you can indicate this by placing a cross in the box 'use cathether'.
column13: 8. In the past month, have you had difficulty retaining urine?
column14: 9. In the past month, have you had involuntary loss of urine?
column15: 10. In the past month, have you had the feeling that after passing urine your bladder was not completely empty?
column16: 11. In the past month, has the stream of urine been weak?
column17: 12. In the past month, have you had to pass urine again within 2 hours of the previous time?
column18: 13. In the past month, have you had to pass urine at night?
column19: 14. In the past month, when standing up have you had the feeling of either becoming lightheaded, or no longer being able to see properly, or no longer being able to think clearly?
column20: 15. In the past month, did you become light-headed after standing for some time?
column21: 16. Have you fainted in the past 6 months?
column22: 17. In the past month, have you ever perspired excessively during the day?
column23: 18. In the past month, have you ever perspired excessively during the night?
column24: 19. In the past month, have your eyes ever been over-sensitive to bright light?
column25: 20. In the past month, how often have you had trouble tolerating cold?
column26: 21. In the past month, how often have you had trouble tolerating heat?
column27: What is the gender of the participant?
column28: 22. In the past month, have you been impotent (unable to have or maintain an erection)?
column29: 23. In the past month, how often have you been unable to ejaculate?
column30: 23a. In the past month, have you taken medication for an erection disorder?
column31: Which medication have you taken for an erection disorder?
column32: 24. In the past month, was your vagina too dry during sexual activity?
column33: 25. In the past month, have you had difficulty reaching an orgasm?
